body_1: Maison Belle was founded in 2014 around a single belief: that beauty should feel like a quiet homecoming. We are a small team of certified specialists, working with the world's finest clinical brands inside a serene atelier where time slows down.
body_2: Every treatment begins with consultation. Every space is sterile, every product hand-selected. The result is care that reveals — never masks — the woman in front of us.

principles.title: Professionalism
principles.desc: Doctor-led consultations and certified specialists in every chair.

principles.title: Hygiene
principles.desc: Hospital-grade sterilisation; single-use tools as a quiet standard.

principles.title: Results
principles.desc: Visible, lasting outcomes — refined with each visit.
